description: The three inventory registrations (secretx-tpm2/src/lib.rs:434-456) all accept any tpm2 URI regardless of mode. A key/ URI (Mode::Sign) successfully constructs via BackendRegistration and returns Arc<dyn SecretStore>, but get() and refresh() always return Err at runtime (line 196-201). Conversely, an nv/ URI constructs via SigningBackendRegistration, but sign() always fails (line 290-295). The factory closures should validate mode vs registration type and return SecretError::InvalidUri if mismatched. This would fail fast at construction time instead of at first use. Example fix for BackendRegistration: reject URIs with key/ prefix; for SigningBackendRegistration: reject URIs with nv/ prefix.
title: tpm2: inventory factories accept mode-incompatible URIs
